body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
* Updates to Insolation 1.1 API
* Simplifies atmos code by separating concerns: all radiation and orbital geometry calculations and helper variables are handled by Insolation
* Removes a test that is a pure insolation test and covered by Insolation.jl
* Not related: Sets a restart test to soft fail as it fails randomly

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
When `a` is negative, `entr` at the boundary becomes zero. This differs from our expectation that we set a limit value for entr/detr when a is below eps. This PR sets `entr` at the boundary equal to `detr` when `a` is negative to allow some mixing (both are equal to `entr_detr_limit_entr_tau`).
